title: Company Law & Corporate Governance
shortDescription: Corporate secretarial compliances under Companies Act, 2013, MCA filings, entity incorporation, ROC annual returns, and secretarial maintenance.
fullDescription: Corporate legal compliance requires continuous tracking of statutory obligations under the Companies Act, 2013 and regulations issued by the Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA). Anil Puneet and Associates provides regulatory advisory and compliance management for corporate entities. We assist with company and LLP incorporation, annual ROC filings (Form AOC-4, MGT-7/7A), maintenance of statutory registers, board meeting documentation, capital restructuring, and director compliance.
scopeOfWork: Incorporation of Private Limited, Public Limited, OPC, and Limited Liability Partnerships (LLP)
Annual ROC returns preparation and electronic filing (AOC-4, MGT-7, MGT-7A, Form 11, Form 8)
Drafting minutes of Board Meetings, Extra-Ordinary General Meetings (EGM), and AGMs
Maintenance of statutory registers (Register of Members, Directors, Charges, Contracts)
Director Identification Number (DIN) allocation, e-KYC filing (DIR-3 KYC), and appointment/resignation filings
Capital alterations: Increase in authorized capital, rights issue, private placement (PAS-3), allotment
Charge creation, modification, and satisfaction filings (CHG-1, CHG-4)
Significant Beneficial Ownership (SBO) compliance (BEN-2 filing) and MCA portal updates

process.title: Compliance Audit & Due Diligence
process.description: Reviewing existing corporate records, MCA portal master data, and statutory registers.

process.title: Document Drafting & Approval
process.description: Preparing board resolutions, notices, financial statements attachments, and return forms.

process.title: Certification & Submission
process.description: Professional certification of MCA e-forms by Principal CA and submission on MCA V3 portal.

process.title: Archival & Register Maintenance
process.description: Updating physical and electronic statutory registers upon approval of SRN by ROC.

deliverables.title: ROC Filing Acknowledgements & SRN Receipts
deliverables.description: Official MCA receipts confirming approved filing of annual and event-based forms.

deliverables.title: Statutory Registers Set
deliverables.description: Duly updated statutory registers of members, directors, debenture holders, and charges.

deliverables.title: Board & Shareholder Meeting Minutes Docket
deliverables.description: Professional record of proceedings, resolutions, and attendance registers.

deliverables.title: Certificate of Incorporation / Charge Satisfaction
deliverables.description: Official ministry certificates issued upon incorporation or charge release.

faqs.question: What are the key mandatory annual filings for a Private Limited Company?
faqs.answer: A Private Limited Company must file Form AOC-4 (Financial Statements) within 30 days of AGM and Form MGT-7/7A (Annual Return) within 60 days of AGM. In addition, DIR-3 KYC for all directors must be completed annually by September 30.

faqs.question: What are the penalties for late ROC filings under MCA V3?
faqs.answer: Late filing fees under MCA V3 attract an additional fee of ₹100 per day of delay without any upper ceiling for normal filings. Persistent default can lead to active status disqualification or adjudication proceedings under Section 454.

faqs.question: How long does company incorporation take through SPICe+ portal?
faqs.answer: Company incorporation through the MCA SPICe+ (INC-32) integrated application generally takes between 3 to 7 working days, subject to name reservation approval and document verification by the Central Processing Centre (CRC).

keyHighlights: Professional certification by Practicing CA as required under MCA rules
Expertise in MCA V3 portal filings and compliance tracking
Comprehensive maintenance of statutory records and secretarial files
Proactive monitoring of statutory deadlines to eliminate late fees
